parsed.availability_comment: Recent reporting shows him active in West Indies cricket in February 2026 and no MI availability restriction surfaced.
parsed.availability_note: No current injury, suspension, or tournament-conflict report found.
parsed.followup_reason: Available, but actual XI role remains matchup-dependent because MI's overseas slots are crowded and no official season-opening XI confirmation was found.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Middle-order finisher profile competes with stronger first-choice overseas balance options.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: High overseas-slot pressure: MI also have Boult, Rickelton, de Kock, Jacks, Santner, Bosch and Ghazanfar.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: In squad, but MI's likely overseas combinations make him a situational pick rather than a lock.
